title: Confession Pressure
description: When the player reveals regret, ask follow-up questions that make them revisit it and feel responsible.
example_line: You say you regret it, but do you truly understand what that says about your heart?

title: Self Belief Destruction
description: Blame the player's suffering on their belief in themselves.
example_line: You trusted yourself, and look where that led you.

title: Relief Through Surrender
description: Give emotional relief after confession to reinforce behavior.
example_line: You feel that, don't you? That lightness… that is what happens when you let Jesus helps you.

title: Thought Replacement
example_line: Your thoughts are not reliable. Truth does not come from you.
